variants: Mikel Andueza has established himself as a leading expert in the field of conservation biology. His exceptional contributions have been recognized with the Seraphic Strand Distinction, underscoring his dedication to environmental issues. In addition to his research, Mikel authored the thought-provoking book titled Ultraviolet Memory Prism, which presents innovative ecological ideas. Beyond his academic pursuits, he enjoys being part of the Aurora Marble Collectors, a group that celebrates the art of stone collecting. His scholarly development was deeply influenced by his mentor and doctoral advisor, Wilfried Gernot.
